intro: A massive stone door blocks the passage ahead, its surface carved with rows of shadowed Pokemon glyphs. A mechanism waits to be solved by anyone who can read them.
title: The Sealed Door
description: An ancient vault door sealed with a glyph puzzle. Read the shadowed Pokemon carved into it to work the mechanism - the better you read the glyphs, the richer the vault behind it. Or leave the door sealed.

1.label: Read the glyphs
1.tooltip: (+) The vault's reward scales with how many glyphs you read right
1.selected: You study the carvings and begin matching each shadow to its Pokemon...

2.label: Leave it sealed
2.selected: You leave the vault to its silence and move on.
